name: Tao Qian (Gongzu)
page_title: Tao Qian (Gongzu) 陶謙 (恭祖) [Zhang Wen, Tao Qian] – Romance of the Three Kingdoms Encyclopedia – Kongming’s Archives
novel_notes:
Differences Between Fact and Common Fiction
	
		
	Threatened historically to put a later adviser of Sun Ce’s, Lü Fan, to torture. Was probably not the benevolent ruler as he appears to be in Romance of the Three Kingdoms.
	Tao Qian did not offer Xuzhou to Liu Bei, let alone three times. He did, however, explain to his subordinates that only Liu Bei could restore order to Xuzhou. Kong Rong and Chen Deng asked him to govern.

full_text:
Tao Qian (Gongzu) 陶謙 (恭祖)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Tao Qian (陶謙), styledGongzu (恭祖), was born in Danyang. Inspector of Xuzhou. Fought violently with Cao Cao. Died of illness. Tao Qian was affiliated with Zhang Wen. Tao Qian lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
